summary.title: New Threat Model
summary.description:
4 trust boundaries: On-Site/External Principals, Internal Service Layer, AI Subsystem, Database Layer
5 External Entities: Guest, Staff, Surveillance Cameras, External IdP
5 Processes: Booking API, Pseudonymization Service, Media Linker Service, AI Facial Recognition Service, Audit Logging Service
4 Data Stores: PII DB, Pseudonymized DB, Media DB, Audit Log Store
12 STRIDE-trusler fordelt på komponentene — inkludert T9 og T10 som begge er AI-spesifikke
